title: tags
description: Registry tags extracted from the game's data/minecraft/tags/* registries. Maps each registry kind to its tags; each tag maps to the resolved list of registry entry names. Nested #tag references are flattened by the generator, so members are always concrete entries.

block.description: Tags over the block registry (e.g. minecraft:mineable/pickaxe, minecraft:needs_iron_tool).

item.description: Tags over the item registry (e.g. minecraft:pickaxes, minecraft:logs).

fluid.description: Tags over the fluid registry (e.g. minecraft:water, minecraft:lava).

entity_type.description: Tags over the entity type registry (e.g. minecraft:skeletons, minecraft:raiders).

^[a-z_/]+$.description: Any additional registry kind the generator emits, including path-shaped ones (e.g. game_event, worldgen/biome) — same tag-map shape.

tagMap.description: Maps a namespaced tag name to its member entry names. Empty member lists are valid: vanilla ships empty tags (e.g. minecraft:incorrect_for_diamond_tool on 1.21.8).
